title: The Southwest Asia Crossroad: Pivot for War, or Peaceful Development with the New Silk Road?
description:
Moderator: Diane Sare

3:47 Hussein Askary (Sweden/Iraq), Southwest Asia Director, Schiller Institute: “Justice for The Nations of Southwest Asia”
28:30 Hisham Sharaf (Yemen), Minister of Foreign Affairs
35:52 Haidar Al-Fuadi Al-Atabe (Iraq), Member, Council of Representatives
Professor Mohammad Ali Ibrahim, Advisor to the Transport Minister of Egypt.
44:25 Shakeel Ahmad Ramay (Pakistan): Director of the China Center at the Pakistani Sustainable Development Policy Institute
57:26 State Senator (former) Richard H. Black (U.S.), “The Truth about the Syrian Crisis.”
1:16:28 Zaid Ayoub Arbache, Assistant Professor, Dr. Faculty of Economics, Damascus University
1:26:44 M. Michel Raimbaud, former French Ambassador to Arab, African, and Latin American Countries; former director of the French Office of the Protection of Refugees and Stateless Persons (OFPRA)
1:43:38 Jacques Cheminade (France), Président, Solidarite et Progres, “A Call to Action”
